requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz and Utility Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: 电网接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及公用事业协调
requirement_topic.zht: 電網接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及公用事業協調

summary.en: Nicaragua's electricity sector is overseen by MEM for energy policy and INE as the national energy regulator, with ENATREL operating transmission and DISNORTE / DISSUR handling much of distribution. EV charger projects should be treated as electrical installations requiring project-level confirmation of supply capacity, metering, protection, load management, and commissioning with the relevant utility or authority. Nicaragua uses an Americas-style 120/240 V, 60 Hz supply environment; any AC or DC charger package should document input voltage, frequency, earthing, surge protection, harmonics, and site load calculations before installation.
summary.zh: 尼加拉瓜电力部门由MEM负责能源政策、INE作为国家能源监管机构，ENATREL负责输电，DISNORTE / DISSUR承担大量配电业务。电动汽车充电桩项目应按电气装置处理，须与相关公用事业单位或主管机构逐项确认供电容量、计量、保护、负载管理和调试要求。尼加拉瓜采用美洲体系120/240 V、60 Hz供电环境；任何交流或直流充电桩资料包在安装前均应说明输入电压、频率、接地、浪涌保护、谐波和站点负荷计算。
summary.zht: 尼加拉瓜電力部門由MEM負責能源政策、INE作為國家能源監管機構，ENATREL負責輸電，DISNORTE / DISSUR承擔大量配電業務。電動汽車充電樁項目應按電氣裝置處理，須與相關公用事業單位或主管機構逐項確認供電容量、計量、保護、負載管理和調試要求。尼加拉瓜採用美洲體系120/240 V、60 Hz供電環境；任何交流或直流充電樁資料包在安裝前均應說明輸入電壓、頻率、接地、浪湧保護、諧波和站點負荷計算。

standards_or_laws: Nicaragua MEM electricity-sector policy and planning functions
INE electricity-sector regulation and approval context
Local DISNORTE / DISSUR distribution-utility connection requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 charger safety requirements, GB/T 20234 connector hardware, and GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication. That China domestic electrical baseline does not prove compatibility with Nicaragua's 60 Hz supply, 120/240 V service conventions, local grounding practice, utility metering, or distribution capacity review.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常围绕220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023充电安全要求、GB/T 20234接口硬件和GB/T 27930-2023直流通信设计。该中国国内电气基线不能证明其适配尼加拉瓜60 Hz供电、120/240 V服务制式、当地接地做法、公用事业计量或配电容量审查。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常圍繞220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023充電安全要求、GB/T 20234接口硬體和GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊設計。該中國國內電氣基線不能證明其適配尼加拉瓜60 Hz供電、120/240 V服務制式、當地接地做法、公用事業計量或配電容量審查。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger input ratings cover Nicaragua's 60 Hz service and the actual project voltage, which may be 120/240 V single-phase for smaller AC installations or a utility-specified three-phase service for higher-power equipment. The documentation package should include line diagrams, load calculations, breaker and RCD/GFCI strategy, harmonic data, surge-protection evidence, commissioning records, and utility coordination notes. A China-only 50 Hz 220/380 V nameplate is not Nicaragua grid-ready without redesign or rating confirmation.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认充电桩输入额定值覆盖尼加拉瓜60 Hz供电及项目实际电压；小型交流安装可能为120/240 V单相，较高功率设备则可能采用公用事业指定的三相服务。文件包应包括单线图、负荷计算、断路器及RCD/GFCI策略、谐波数据、浪涌保护证据、调试记录和公用事业协调记录。仅标注中国50 Hz、220/380 V的铭牌，在未重新设计或确认额定范围前，不满足尼加拉瓜并网准备。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認充電樁輸入額定值覆蓋尼加拉瓜60 Hz供電及項目實際電壓；小型交流安裝可能為120/240 V單相，較高功率設備則可能採用公用事業指定的三相服務。文件包應包括單線圖、負荷計算、斷路器及RCD/GFCI策略、諧波數據、浪湧保護證據、調試記錄和公用事業協調記錄。僅標註中國50 Hz、220/380 V的銘牌，在未重新設計或確認額定範圍前，不滿足尼加拉瓜併網準備。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but practical gate — utility and authority coordination is required for grid-connected electrical installations; confirm exact INE, ENATREL, DISNORTE or DISSUR route before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a Nicaragua utility approval substitute; voltage and frequency ratings must be re-confirmed for 120/240 V, 60 Hz conditions

source.publisher: Ministerio de Energía y Minas de Nicaragua

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Nicaragua grid connection as a project approval and engineering exercise. Confirm 120/240 V, 60 Hz compatibility, the actual service voltage, and the utility acceptance path with INE, ENATREL, DISNORTE or DISSUR before ordering hardware.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将尼加拉瓜并网接入视为项目审批和工程设计事项。在订购硬件前，应与INE、ENATREL、DISNORTE或DISSUR确认120/240 V、60 Hz兼容性、实际服务电压和公用事业验收路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將尼加拉瓜併網接入視為項目審批和工程設計事項。在訂購硬體前，應與INE、ENATREL、DISNORTE或DISSUR確認120/240 V、60 Hz兼容性、實際服務電壓和公用事業驗收路徑。
